transcript: Speaker A: Sorry sir, sorry sir, nyan English pathu divasathil padikam sir, vishwasikyu sir. [Sorry sir, sorry sir, I will learn English in 10 days sir, please believe me sir.] Speaker B: English padikate nee ini office-il varandah. [Without learning English, don't come to the office anymore.] Speaker A: Sir, I try, I try. Speaker A: Chetta, enne 20 minute-il office-il ethikyu please. [Brother, please get me to the office in 20 minutes.] Speaker C: Ma'am, it's showing around 40 minutes on the map. The traffic is quite heavy today. Speaker A: Kollalo chetta, ningal driver alle, ennitt ithra nalla English engane samsaarikunnu? [Great brother, you are a driver, yet how do you speak such good English?] Speaker C: Madam, English padikkan easy aanu. Ningalkku phone mathi. [Madam, learning English is easy. You just need a phone.] Speaker A: Phone-ilo? Enikku manasilayilla, ath engane? [On phone? I didn't understand, how is that?] Speaker C: Nooku, ente phone-il SpeakX app undu. Ithu oru AI English teaching app aanu. Ithu use cheythal ningalkku eppam venamengilum English samsaariychu padikyam. Office-il, friends-inodu, allenkil manager-odu engane samsaarikkanam, restaurant-il engane order cheyyanam. So ithil basics-otu daily life situations vare namukku practice cheyyam. Ithil divasavum namukku 10-15 minute vare teacher-odu samsaarichu English padikyam. Enne nooku, part-time job cheythukondu ente English kondu mathrama enikku office-il job kitti. Athukondu ini naanakedu vichaarikenda aavashyamilla. 15 divasam kondu namukku SpeakX app use cheythukondu English nannayi samsaarikkan pattum. [Look, I have the SpeakX app on my phone. This is an AI English teaching app. Using this, you can practice speaking English anytime. How to speak in office, with friends, or with manager, how to order in a restaurant. So in this, we can practice from basics to daily life situations. In this, we can practice speaking English with a teacher for 10-15 minutes daily. Look at me, while doing a part-time job, I got an office job solely because of my English. So no need to feel embarrassed anymore. In 15 days, using the SpeakX app, we can speak English well.] Speaker A: Sheri, enna njan ippo thanne SpeakX app download cheyyam. [Okay, then I will download the SpeakX app right now.]
on_screen_text: Sorry sir, sorry sir, nyan English pathu divasathil vishwasikyu sir. English padikate varathen. Sir, I try, I try. Chetta, enne 20 minute-il ethikyu please. it's showing around 40 minutes on the traffic Kollalo chetta, ningal driver alle, ennitt ithra nalla English engane samsaarikunnu? English padikkan ningalku phone mathi. Phone-ilo? Enikku manasilayilla, ath engane? ente phone-il ithu oru AI English teaching app aanu. ithu use cheythal eppam venamengilum padikyam. Office-il friends-inodu samsaarikanam, engane orderiyanam. So ithil basics-otu ellam padikyam. ithil daivasam namakku 10-15 minute samsaarichu Enne noku, part-time ente English office-il job kitti. Athukondu ini aavasiyam illa, 15 divasathil SpeakX app English Sheri, enna njan ippo thanne download cheyam.
summary: A woman facing job loss due to poor English is advised by a fluent bike taxi driver to use the SpeakX AI app. He explains how the app offers daily practice for real-life scenarios, prompting her to download it immediately.
